_comment: Eval-only scenario metadata that does not belong in a real .sleep.json. Drives the deterministic scorer sub-scores that replay pure functions.

restop._comment: no-double-count scenario: the SAME session_id is stopped twice (score 3 then 1). Replaying upsertSessionOnStop twice must leave debt 1, sessions.length 1 (NOT 4).

denseSession._comment: edit-free-but-dense session (s-dense). change_count 0, tool_count 5 (→ max(change,tool)=1). Substance signals are high so AFTER scoring lifts it to >=2.
